repo-audit.description: Inspect repo state and propose the next safe implementation steps
repo-audit.template: Audit the current repository for the H&M personalized fashion recommendations project. Summarize implemented components, missing pieces, data assumptions, and the next highest-leverage tasks. Use the project instructions and available skills.

data-contract.description: Check expected H&M input files, schemas, and leakage risks
data-contract.template: Review the expected H&M Kaggle data contract for this repo. Identify required files, expected columns, ID formatting, local path conventions, privacy/license constraints, and temporal leakage risks. Do not modify files unless explicitly asked.

validation-design.description: Design or review temporal validation and MAP@12 evaluation
validation-design.template: Design or review the offline validation setup for predicting the 7-day period after the training window. Focus on temporal splits, candidate generation evaluation, MAP@12 correctness, and reproducibility.

two-tower-plan.description: Plan the two-tower recommender architecture and training pipeline
two-tower-plan.template: Create a concrete implementation plan for the H&M two-tower recommender. Cover customer/item features, text/image metadata options, negatives, loss, retrieval, re-ranking hooks, validation, and submission generation.

submission-check.description: Verify Kaggle submission format and ranking quality checks
submission-check.template: Check the planned or generated H&M Kaggle submission workflow. Ensure every sample_submission customer_id receives up to 12 space-separated article_id predictions, article IDs preserve leading zeroes, duplicates are removed per customer, and no test-period leakage is used.

review-ml.description: Review ML code changes for correctness, leakage, and reproducibility
review-ml.template: Review the current changes as an ML/recommender systems code reviewer. Prioritize correctness bugs, leakage, reproducibility gaps, expensive data operations, missing tests, and submission-format risks. Lead with findings and file references.

sdd-audit.description: Create or review the spec-driven development plan for this H&M recommender
sdd-audit.template: Create a concise spec-driven development audit for the H&M recommender project. Cover outcomes, scope boundaries, constraints and assumptions, prior decisions, task breakdown, and verification criteria. Be skeptical about unproven assumptions and separate repo configuration from model implementation.

candidate-plan.description: Design robust multi-source candidate generation for H&M recommendations
candidate-plan.template: Design the candidate generation plan for the H&M recommendation pipeline. Include repeat purchase, recent popularity, customer segment popularity, item-item similarity, co-visitation, graph retrieval, two-tower retrieval, multimodal/content retrieval, backfill, recall metrics, and leakage controls.

ranking-plan.description: Design ranking, blending, and ensembling for MAP@12
ranking-plan.template: Design the ranking and ensembling plan for H&M recommendations. Cover feature families, LambdaMART/GBDT ranking, neural reranking options, calibration, diversity, duplicate handling, candidate-source features, blending strategy, ablations, and validation against MAP@12.

experiment-plan.description: Design experiment tracking, ablations, and reproducibility controls
experiment-plan.template: Create an experiment governance plan for the H&M recommender. Define run metadata, deterministic seeds, split registry, artifact naming, ablation protocol, comparison table, model cards, reproducibility checks, and promotion criteria.

multimodal-plan.description: Design text/image/content embeddings for fashion recommendation
multimodal-plan.template: Design a multimodal feature and retrieval plan for H&M fashion recommendations. Cover article text embeddings, image embeddings, CLIP-style retrieval, dense content embeddings for cold-start robustness, dimensionality reduction, caching, leakage controls, and how these candidates blend with collaborative signals.
